edgeCases: coverage tolerance boundary: claimed figure within 0.1% of measured passes; one tick above fails — documented in KB Examples and [verify] toml reference
CONFIG ERROR vs FAIL distinction: missing validate.commands produces a configuration error message, not a claim failure — documented in KB How it behaves
edge-case mapping is warn-only: unmapped edge cases do not hard-block centinela complete — clearly distinguished from hard-fail checks in KB and README gate section
